frames.summary: 4-panel establishing standoff: Lin Ye and Enforcer face off at moonlit ruined altar. Enforcer raises hand, three sword shadows ignite. Lin Ye grips cracked sword. Tension between two figures.

frames.summary: 6-panel first sword clash: Sword shadow launches at Lin Ye, he blocks with cracked sword, sparks explode, he's knocked back three steps. Enforcer watches unmoved.

frames.summary: 9-panel close-quarters combat: Lin Ye deflects second sword, charges in, trades blows with Enforcer at close range. Weapons lock face-to-face.

frames.summary: 4-panel blood ritual: Blood drips on array patterns, Lin Ye pulls jade talisman, tears wrist bandage, blood activates arrays spreading blue glow across altar.

frames.summary: 9-panel soul-fire eruption: Blue fire geysers from altar floor, slamming into vortex. Sword compresses to blue spike. Vortex torn open. Enforcer retreats for first time.

frames.summary: 9-panel desperate charge: Lin Ye launches like an arrow, blood scattering, smashes into sword wall of white blades. Pushes through explosion step by step.

frames.summary: 6-panel killing strike: Lin Ye breaks through, face to face with Enforcer. Blue spike pierces forehead mark. Cracks spread. Enforcer's disbelief.

dialogue.text: 这一击，不是为了赢。是为了让你记住——凡人，也能逆天。

frames.summary: 4-panel aftermath: Sword shadows shatter like glass. Forehead mark crumbles to golden dust. Enforcer drops to both knees. Rain begins falling.
